title: Gag Reflex
body_html:
The pharyngeal reflex or gag reflex is a reflex contraction of pharyngeal muscles and lifting of the soft palate that is typically evoked by touching the posterior pharyngeal wall.


The sensory limb is mediated predominantly by CN IX (glossopharyngeal nerve) the motor response by CN X (Vagus).
